title: geum rubrum
intro: Geum rubrum, also known as the red avens or European avens, is a flowering plant species in the family Rosaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and wounds, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant's root and leaves are rich in flavonoids and tannins, which provide health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. Geum rubrum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a versatile ingredient in traditional medicine and natural remedies.
